## Initial Conclusion

Each traffic type shows a different protocol distribution that can become ML features.

- YouTube tends to favor QUIC and UDP.
- Download tends to favor TCP and TLS.
- Browsing tends to mix TCP, TLS, and more visible DNS activity.
